creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012
New Revision: 304518
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304518

Log:
  Add trytond_analytic_account 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform
  (Analytic Account Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171498
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:47:58 2012	(r304517)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012	(r304518)
@@ -113,6 +113,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_statement
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_stock_continental
+    SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_account
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012	(r304518)
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_analytic_account
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Analytic Account Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_company>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_company \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party \
+		trytond_currency>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_currency \
+		trytond_account>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012	(r304518)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_analytic_account-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 29f7859358630812a2e0c23db1b8fba37eef8fa00f5afcbff9447b8d32c4b8c1
+SIZE (trytond_analytic_account-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 31501

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012	(r304518)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Analytic Account Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_account/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
